Bootstrap log hazard ratios from IPCW Cox models

Source: R/data.R
cox_boot_lhr.Rd

A numeric vector of 500 bootstrap log hazard ratio estimates for the effect of treatment (x) on progression-free survival, each obtained by fitting an IPCW-weighted Cox model to one bootstrap sample of single_example_dat. Provided as package data to avoid re-running the time-consuming bootstrap in vignettes and examples. Use with get_boot_pci() and get_boot_var() to obtain bootstrap-based confidence intervals and variance estimates.

Usage

data(cox_boot_lhr)

Format

A numeric vector of length 500.

Source

Generated by the authors by applying get_ipcw_boot() to single_example_dat with B = 500 and seed = 20240917, then fitting get_ipcw_cox_fit() to each bootstrap sample and extracting log_hr.
